rule CDB_Netty_HAProxy_SSL_TLV_parsing_leaks_reta {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Netty: HAProxy SSL TLV parsing leaks retained slice on invalid TLV length"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-11559 - CodeAstro Payroll System view_account.php s"; content:"CVE-2026-11559"; nocase; sid:2079219; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
